base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_bomb_upgrade — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. Morph Ball Bomb — permanent upgrade. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Morph Ball Bomb — permanent upgrade; enables bomb-laying in morph-ball mode
